title: not red dust
description: enables customization or redstone dust look
body:
This mod is just a cosmetic mod that aims to customize the look of good ol' redstone dust and has three different modes:
Rainbow, One Color and Gradient.  
---
ModMenu is an ~~optional dependency but with out it or any nbt editor you can't change settings~~ required dependency, oops.  
No, forge is not something i would consider.
